mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket (order_id, user_id, qr_code, ticket_no, status, verify_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{qrCode}, #{ticketNo}, #{status}, #{verifyTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

INSERT INTO ticket (order_id, user_id, qr_code, ticket_no, status, verify_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{ticket.orderId}, #{ticket.userId}, #{ticket.qrCode}, #{ticket.ticketNo}, #{ticket.status}, #{ticket.verifyTime}, #{ticket.createTime}, #{ticket.updateTime})
